login.title: Login
login.welcomeSubtitle: Log in to your ClubManager account
login.emailNotVerifiedDescription: Please verify your email address before logging in. Check your inbox.
login.termsPrefix: By logging in, you accept our

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Join ClubManager and manage your club easily
register.terms: I accept the terms of service
register.accountCreatedDescription: A verification email has been sent to you. Check your mailbox to activate your account.
register.accountCreatedMessage: Account created! Your login ID has been sent to you by email. Check your mailbox before logging in.
register.termsPrefix: By creating an account, you accept our

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address to receive a reset link
forgotPassword.checkEmailDescription: Check your inbox for the reset link. If you don't receive an email within a few minutes, check your spam folder.
forgotPassword.emailSent: Check your inbox to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailSentSecurityMessage: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a reset link.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been changed successfully.
resetPassword.redirecting: Your password has been changed successfully. You will be redirected to the login page...
resetPassword.passwordRequirements: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, numbers and special characters
resetPassword.tokenExpiredError: The token is invalid or has expired.

emailVerification.title: Email verification
emailVerification.verifyingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address.
emailVerification.successDescription: Your email address has been verified successfully.
emailVerification.successAlertMessage: Your email address has been verified successfully. You can now log in with your user ID.
emailVerification.successLoginMessage: Email verified successfully! You can now log in.
emailVerification.resendSuccessDescription: A new verification email has been sent to your address.
emailVerification.sentTo: A verification email has been sent to
emailVerification.tokenExpiredError: The verification token is invalid or has expired.
emailVerification.invalidLinkDescription: The verification link is not valid
emailVerification.invalidLinkMessage: This verification link is invalid or has expired. You can request a new verification email below.

errors.emailExists: This email address is already in use
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the terms of service
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again
errors.firstNameTooShort: First name must be at least 2 characters
errors.firstNameInvalidChars: First name can only contain letters, spaces, apostrophes and hyphens
errors.lastNameTooShort: Last name must be at least 2 characters
errors.lastNameInvalidChars: Last name can only contain letters, spaces, apostrophes and hyphens
errors.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.usernameInvalidChars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens
errors.passwordNeedsUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
errors.passwordNeedsLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
errors.passwordNeedsNumber: Password must contain at least one number
errors.passwordNeedsSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character
errors.ageTooYoung: You must be at least 5 years old to register
errors.birthDateFuture: Date of birth cannot be in the future
errors.birthDateInvalid: Date of birth is not valid
